tasks.name: Create a new agility dog profile with a 120–150 word story and 3 activities
tasks.description: Log in, create a new dog profile named Riley in the 'Agility Stars' section, write a biography between 120–150 words, add exactly 3 activity tags, and set visibility to 'Club Members'.
steps: Navigate to the yearbook portal homepage using the main site URL.
Click the 'Member Login' button in the header area.
In the login form, type 'test_member' into the Username field.
Type 'Password123!' into the Password field.
Click the 'Log In' button to access the member dashboard.
In the main navigation bar, click 'My Dogs' to open your dog profiles list.
On the 'My Dogs' page, click the 'Add New Profile' button.

In the profile form, type 'Riley' in the Dog Name field, select 'Border Collie' from the Breed dropdown, choose '2021' in the Birth Year dropdown, and select 'Agility Stars' from the Section dropdown.

In the Biography text area, type a story of roughly 130 words (between 120 and 150 words) about Riley’s agility achievements, then in the Activities field add exactly three tags by typing 'Weave Poles', 'Jumping', and 'Relay Teams' and clicking each suggestion, set the Visibility dropdown to 'Club Members', and click the 'Save Profile' button.

tasks.name: Upgrade Bella’s ad to the cheapest half-page option under $60 with 100+ words
tasks.description: Edit Bella’s yearbook ad so it uses the least expensive half-page layout that costs $60 or less, has ad text of at least 100 words, and no add-ons that push total cost over $60.
steps: From the member dashboard, click 'Yearbook Ads' in the main navigation.
On the 'My Ads' list, locate the row for dog 'Bella' and click the 'Edit' link for that ad.
In the Ad Size dropdown, review the options and identify 'Full Page - $90', 'Half Page Classic - $55', 'Half Page Premium - $65', and 'Quarter Page - $35'.
Select 'Half Page Classic - $55' from the Ad Size dropdown because it is the cheapest option that is a Half Page and costs $60 or less.
In the Ad Text field, expand Bella’s tribute to approximately 110 words (at least 100 words but fewer than 130) by adding one or two additional sentences.
In the 'Add-on Options' list, click to uncheck any selected add-ons such as 'Foil Title - $10' or 'Extra Icons - $5' so that the displayed total ad cost does not exceed $60.
Set the Placement Preference dropdown to 'General Dog Tributes' and select the 'Online Only' radio button under Proofing Method.
Click the 'Save and Return to Summary' button to store Bella’s updated ad configuration.

tasks.name: Create a two-dog spread for Milo and Luna using the cheapest 2-dog layout with 200+ words
tasks.description: Create a new two-dog feature spread for Milo and Luna, choosing the lowest-priced layout that supports 2 dogs and at least 200 words of text, and assign it to the 'Companions & Families' section.
steps: In the main navigation, click 'Layouts & Spreads' to open the layout management area.
Click the 'Create New Spread' button on the spreads overview page.
Under 'Spread Type', select the 'Two-Dog Feature' option.
In the layout gallery filters, click the checkbox or toggle for 'Supports 2 Dogs' and also enable the filter labeled 'Min Text 200+ words'.
Click the 'Sort By' dropdown above the layout gallery and select 'Price: Low to High'.
From the sorted layouts, click the first layout card in the list that displays a text limit of '200+ words' in its details.
In the Dog 1 dropdown on the chosen layout, select 'Milo', and in the Dog 2 dropdown, select 'Luna'.
In the 'Spread Title' field, type 'Milo & Luna: Park Adventures' and choose 'Companions & Families' from the Section dropdown.
Click the 'Save Spread' button to add this two-dog spread to your yearbook submissions.

tasks.name: Add 4 achievements for Nova between 2020–2024 and sort them oldest-first
tasks.description: For dog Nova, add four achievements dated between 2020 and 2024 with at least two Agility and two Obedience events, then filter to 2020–2024 and sort the achievements from oldest to newest.
steps: Click 'My Dogs' in the main navigation and then click on the dog name 'Nova' to open Nova’s profile page.
Inside Nova’s profile, click the 'Achievements' tab.
Click the 'Add Achievement' button and in the form enter the title 'Agility Trial Win', choose 'Agility' as the Type, set the Date field to '2020-05-10', and click the 'Add' button.

Repeat the 'Add Achievement' process three more times: create one 'Agility' achievement dated '2021-09-18' and two 'Obedience' achievements dated '2022-03-22' and '2024-01-05', entering appropriate titles of your choice and clicking 'Add' for each.
Click the 'Filter by Year' dropdown and select the range option labeled '2020–2024'.
In the 'Minimum Events' field or slider, set the value to '4' so that only dogs with at least 4 achievements in that range are shown.
Click the 'Apply Filters' button, then click the 'Sort By' dropdown above the achievements list.
In the 'Sort By' dropdown, select 'Date (Oldest First)' and then click the 'Save Achievements Order' button to store the new order.

tasks.name: Submit a proof approval for Bella with editor-only comments and 3-day auto-approval
tasks.description: Open Bella’s profile proof, leave one editor-only comment and one private note, then set the approval status to 'Approve with Changes' and enable auto-approval if editors do not respond within 3 days.
steps: From the member dashboard, click 'Proofs & Approvals' in the main navigation.
In the proofs list, locate the entry for Bella’s profile and click the 'Open Proof' button or link.
On the proof view, click the 'Add Comment' button near the main bio text block, type a one- to two-sentence revision request, and select the 'Editors Only' visibility option.
Click the 'Post Comment' button to add your editor-only comment.

Scroll to the footer area of the proof and click another 'Add Comment' button, type a short internal note to yourself, and select the 'Private (Just Me)' visibility option before clicking 'Post Comment'.
Click the 'Approval Options' or 'Approval Settings' button or tab associated with this proof.
In the auto-approval section, check the box labeled 'Auto-approve if no editor response within 3 days' and then select the 'Approve with Changes' radio button as your decision.
Click the 'Submit Approval Request' button to finalize your approval settings for Bella’s proof.

tasks.name: Order 3 softcover yearbooks with the cheapest shipping under $10 and pay by invoice
tasks.description: Place an order for three copies of the 2025 Club Yearbook, choose softcover binding, select the lowest-cost shipping method that is priced under $10, and choose the 'Pay Later / Invoice My Member Account' payment option.
steps: Click 'Order Yearbook' in the main navigation to open the yearbook product page.
On the product page, select '2025 Club Yearbook' from the Edition dropdown.
In the Quantity field, type '3' to order three copies.
In the Binding options section, select the 'Softcover' radio button instead of any hardcover options.
Click the 'Continue to Shipping Options' button to move to the shipping selection step.
In the list of shipping methods, review the prices and select the lowest-priced option whose shipping cost for your order is under $10 (for example, choose 'Economy - $7.99' if available).
Click the button or link to proceed to the payment step, then under Payment Method select the 'Pay Later / Invoice My Member Account' option.
Click the 'Place Order' or 'Confirm Order' button to complete the yearbook order with the chosen quantity, binding, shipping, and payment method.

tasks.name: Finalize only dog profiles with bios of 80+ words and lock them
tasks.description: From your list of dog profiles, use the Bio Word Count column to mark only profiles with 80 or more words as 'Final', leave shorter profiles as 'Draft', and then lock only the final profiles using the bulk actions tool.
steps: Click 'My Dogs' in the main navigation to open your dog profiles list.
Click the 'Columns' or table settings icon and enable the 'Bio Word Count' column by clicking its checkbox so that the word counts are shown in the table.
Click the 'Filter' button above the table, set the Owner filter to your account (for example, 'test_member'), and click 'Apply' to display only your own dog profiles.
In the Bio Word Count column, identify each dog whose count is 80 or higher and for each of those rows click the 'Status' dropdown and select 'Final'.
For any dog row where the Bio Word Count is below 80, click the 'Status' dropdown and select 'Draft'.
Above the table, click the 'Bulk Actions' dropdown and choose the option labeled 'Lock Final Profiles'.
In the first column of the table, click the checkboxes for only the dogs that currently show 'Final' in the Status column.
Click the 'Apply' button next to the Bulk Actions dropdown to lock just the final profiles for the yearbook.

tasks.name: Purchase the most expensive sponsorship package under $75 and assign it to Rex
tasks.description: Select the highest-priced sponsorship package that costs $75 or less, assign it to dog Rex, add a 30–40 word sponsor message, and confirm the sponsorship purchase.
steps: From the member dashboard, click 'Sponsorships' in the main navigation.
On the sponsorships page, click the 'View Packages' button to open the list of available sponsorship packages.
Use the sorting control above the packages to sort them by price from low to high.

Scan the sorted list and identify the most expensive package that is still priced at $75 or less, then click the 'Select Package' button on that package (for example, 'Bronze Paw Sponsor - $70' if it is the highest under $75).
In the 'Assign to Dog' dropdown, select 'Rex' as the dog associated with this sponsorship.
In the 'Sponsor Name' field, type 'The Miller Family' as the display name for the sponsorship.
In the 'Sponsor Message' text box, type a dedication message of approximately 30–40 words describing your support for Rex and the club.
Click the 'Confirm Sponsorship' button to complete the sponsorship purchase for Rex with the selected package and message.

entities.name: YearbookSection

fields.name: status

entities.name: Achievement

fields.description: Achievement title such as 'Agility Trial Win'

fields.name: type
fields.description: Used to ensure at least two Agility and two Obedience events.

entities.name: AdSize

fields.name: code

fields.name: category
fields.description: Grouping to help enforce rules like 'cheapest half-page under $60'.

fields.name: price
fields.description: Base price of this ad size

fields.description: Optional max allowed words for the ad text

entities.name: AdAddon

fields.name: name

entities.name: YearbookAd

fields.name: adSizeId

fields.name: adTextWordCount

fields.name: status
fields.description: Overall lifecycle state of the ad.

entities.description: Configurable yearbook ads linked to specific dog profiles.

entities.name: YearbookAdAddon
entities.description: Join entity representing add-ons selected for a given yearbook ad.

entities.name: Layout

fields.name: name
fields.description: Layout name as shown in gallery

fields.name: minTextWords

fields.name: price
fields.description: Price used when sorting by 'Price: Low to High'

entities.description: Available layout templates for spreads with pricing and content constraints.

entities.name: Spread

fields.name: title
fields.description: Spread title such as 'Milo & Luna: Park Adventures'

fields.name: spreadType

fields.name: dog1Id

fields.name: dog2Id

fields.name: text

fields.name: textWordCount

fields.name: status

entities.name: Proof

fields.name: itemType
fields.description: Type of content this proof is for (profile, ad, or spread).

fields.name: itemId

fields.name: status

fields.name: approvalDecision

fields.name: autoApprovalDays
fields.description: Number of days after which auto-approval occurs (e.g., 3 days).

fields.name: autoApprovalDate

entities.name: ProofComment

fields.name: visibility

fields.name: targetSection
fields.description: Optional identifier for the part of the proof this comment refers to (e.g., 'main_bio', 'footer').

entities.description: Threaded comments on proofs with visibility controls.

entities.name: YearbookEdition

fields.name: name

fields.name: basePrice

entities.name: ShippingMethod

fields.name: baseCost
fields.description: Base shipping cost for the order (e.g., 7.99).

fields.name: costPerAdditionalCopy

entities.name: YearbookOrder

fields.name: shippingCost

fields.name: total

entities.name: YearbookOrderItem
entities.description: Line items within a yearbook order; used mainly for order summaries.
